question: Q3 - Where do I want to get to?

changes_from_previous.structure_changed: Learning-first approach (starts with Year Two patterns, ends with strategy)
added: Pranav integration with direct quote from LC3
INTJ analytical integration (strength becomes counterproductive without constraints)
Personal risk framing (risks connected to actual behavioural patterns)
Three specific patterns from LC1/LC3 as foundation
removed: Generic business statements ('consulting doesn't scale—systems do')
Decorative psychometric references ('aligns with my INTJ profile')
Generic risk list without personal connection

focus_areas: First principles rewrite: learning before strategy
Personal Test: ~95% of sentences reveal something about the student
Personal risks connected to documented patterns
notes: First principles rewrite addressing all Priority 3 feedback items from FINAL-MARKING-SUMMARY. Structure reversed: starts with Year Two learning patterns, derives strategy from those patterns. Every sentence tested against 'Personal Test' - generic business wisdom removed. Psychometrics now analytical (showing understanding of how INTJ becomes counterproductive) rather than decorative (name-dropping). Complete team picture with Pranav integration using direct quote from LC3. Risks now personal (connected to documented patterns) rather than generic.
